nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Small Lifou white-eye
nodes.summary: Small Lifou white-eye（Zosterops minutus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Small Lifou white-eye。

nodes.name: Small Lifou white-eye
nodes.summary: The small Lifou white-eye (Zosterops minutus), also known as the sulphur white-eye, is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the island of Lifou in New Caledonia. References
